_comment: Migration: Spirit Crane Sword Flight. 5 waypoints, 5 follower types, 2 emergent markets. Per migration directive: migration is a major simulation system. The world breathes because markets appear seasonally along routes. Prime Directive: route exists objectively; player enters a world already moving.
name: Spirit Crane Sword Flight
description: The seasonal migration of spirit cranes between sword peaks. Sword cultivators follow this route for centuries.

follower_chain.note: Sword cultivators follow cranes to cultivate sword-intent.
Treasure seekers follow for sword-intent herbs.

simulation_notes.world_breathes: Markets appear and disappear seasonally; the world changes whether or not the player acts.
simulation_notes.follower_dynamics: Each follower type arrives with a delay proportional to distance_li; predators arrive after prey, scavengers after predators, bandits after cultivators, merchants after stability.
